category: Governed AI Operating System for Revenue + Trust

disclosure.en: Starting prices only; floors are fence-bound and not discountable below the listed minimum. Estimated value is not Verified value.
disclosure.ar: أسعار بدئية فقط؛ الحدود الدنيا مُحصّنة بقيود ولا تقبل خصمًا تحت الحد المعلن. القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة.

offers.name: Revenue Hunter Pilot
offers.buyer: B2B SMB owner who wants evidenced lead capture in 14 days
offers.outcome: First 10 qualified leads with Source Passport, before/after pipeline snapshot, Evidence Pack per converted lead
offers.fence: non-discountable below 4,900 SAR; refund window 7 days if no Evidence Pack produced
deliverables: Lead Engine wired to 1 inbound channel (website or WhatsApp inbound)
excluded: External sends without explicit per-message approval

offers.name: AI Trust Kit
offers.buyer: Mid-market company (50-500 employees) preparing for AI adoption with legal exposure concerns
offers.outcome: Published AI Use Policy, Agent Registry baseline, Tool Permission Matrix, first Evidence Pack template, PDPL alignment notes
offers.fence: non-discountable below 18,000 SAR; delivered in 4 weeks
deliverables: AI Use Policy (bilingual) tailored to customer
Agent Registry seeded with customer agents
Evidence Pack format aligned to customer data flows

offers.name: Agency White-label Kit
offers.buyer: Saudi marketing or consulting agency reselling AI ops to its book of business
offers.outcome: White-label tenant, agency-branded reports, revenue share contract, partner enablement
offers.fence: 1,000 SAR/month platform fee + 25% rev share on agency-originated revenue; no exclusivity granted
deliverables: White-label tenant with agency branding (logos, palette, domain)
Partner-facing Agent Registry and Evidence Pack export
2 enablement sessions for the agency team

offers.name: Revenue Command
offers.buyer: Founder or commercial lead who needs a single pane for pipeline plus evidence
offers.outcome: Unified revenue dashboard backed by Evidence Packs; verified revenue only counted with proof
offers.fence: monthly retainer non-discountable below 9,000 SAR/month; 90-day minimum term
deliverables: Pipeline view tied to Evidence Packs
Verified revenue line vs estimated revenue line (separate)

offers.name: Market Radar
offers.buyer: Strategy or BD lead wanting aggregated sector pattern reads (not scraped data)
offers.outcome: Sector report based on aggregated, methodology-disclosed patterns; no confidential metrics
offers.fence: per-report or annual subscription; methodology page published with every report

offers.name: Agentic Control Plane Setup
offers.buyer: Enterprise CIO or CISO standing up AI governance
offers.outcome: Live Agent Registry, Tool Permission Matrix, MCP review pipeline, Evidence Pack standard wired
deliverables: Agent Registry populated for the customer estate
Tool Permission Matrix and approval workflow
MCP server review checklist applied to first 5 servers
Evidence Pack format ratified by customer legal

offers.name: Governance OS Retainer
offers.buyer: Enterprise running AI agents that need ongoing oversight
offers.outcome: Monthly governance reviews, evidence audit, agent permission drift control, incident response readiness
offers.fence: monthly retainer non-discountable below 35,000 SAR/month; 12-month minimum
deliverables: Monthly Evidence Pack audit sample (10% random)
Tool Permission Matrix change review on demand

offers.name: Executive PMO
offers.buyer: C-suite or board sponsoring an AI program needing founder-grade oversight
offers.outcome: Founder-led program management with board-ready reporting and verified-revenue accounting
offers.fence: monthly retainer non-discountable below 100,000 SAR/month; quarterly board review included
deliverables: Program charter aligned to board priorities
Monthly board update with verified vs estimated revenue separated
